title: Make a Newspaper Kite
body: A diamond kite from newsprint and thin sticks. Lifts on the lightest breeze. Free.

source.label: Boys' Life, 1915; Mechanics for Young America, 1905
source.ref: Boys' Life, 1915; Mechanics for Young America, 1905

bands: Two thin wooden sticks (¼-inch dowel or trimmed garden stakes)
A sheet of newspaper, plastic bag, or thin fabric
A short tail of fabric strips or ribbon
